name: Barakah
description: Developer of online marketplace for food retailers designed to help them sell their surplus products & meals. The company provides a green discount on their surplus items using the mobile app in real-time to provide extra food to those who need it, it also provides merchants with a dashboard that illustrates business insights and impact analytics, highlighting operational efficiency and contribution towards ESG (environmental, social, and governance) objectives, enabling restaurants, bakeries, hotels, and supermarkets to reduce food waste and help the ecosystem to get better.

name: Blassa Inc.
description: Blassa optimizes the collection of user delivery information to help eCommerce players eliminate delivery failures and increase conversion rates.

name: Byanat
description: Developer of an analytics platform intended to scale and maintain connected infrastructure. The company's product simplifies device management, offering tools to monitor device health, manage connectivity, and troubleshoot issues remotely and combines connectivity management, and analytics, enabling businesses to make data-driven decisions and improve infrastructure availability and customer experience.

name: Cado Gifts
description: Developer of a gifting platform designed to offer gifting services across the UAE. The company platform offers a wide range of products and experiences that have been carefully selected and curated by the in-house gifting experts, enabling clients to follow the trend and gift the most unique products personalized with high touch service.

name: Fintesa
description: Fintesa is a SaaS Fintech platform that allows any business to compliantly collect payments in over 200 countries for their products, and services - in just 10 minutes.

name: Konn Technologies
description: Konn reshapes modern living by combining elegant modular home design with cutting-edge digital platforms for seamless, customizable homebuilding.

name: Lisan
description: Developer of an AI writing platform intended to help to write in the Arabic language. The company's platform specializes in providing proofreading, grammar checking, and integrated writing assistance, enabling users to maximize their productivity, create exceptional content using AI models, and automate tasks with AI accelerators.

name: LNKO
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer trendy eyewear. The company's platform provides a collection of optic wearables for both men and women, enabling users to choose from a variety of frame styles and colors of eyeglasses.

name: NoBueno
description: Developer of a job-hunting platform designed to pair the right companies with the right candidates. The company's platform helps to enter the education details, and career preferences to provide relevant related role jobs along with one-on-one chat support to connect with prospective employers, enabling users to increase the job selection possibility.

name: Qardy
description: Qardy is the 1st lending aggregator marketplace in Egypt & MENA region that connects MSMEs with financial institutions.

name: Sadq
description: Sadq enables individuals and businesses to execute and verify documents online to make them legally binding in seconds

name: Taskeer Holdings Limited
description: Provider of financial solutions intended to facilitate traditional monthly group savings. The company's platform enables monthly collections that contribute to facilitating money-saving concepts, taking into consideration any challenges and constraints, enabling consumers to get assurance of quality standards, trusted members and accurate receiving dates.
